views.metaphor: Grand Carousel panoramic overview of the fairground
uniqueElements: Ride badge (#1) with accent2 background
Spinning number stat wheels with ease-out animation
Pastel-bordered stat cards (cotton-candy, mint-swirl, lemon-drop, blueberry)
Activity feed with icon-coded entries and time stamps
Quick action grid with dashed-border buttons and puff-up hover
Prize ribbon corner banners (Active, New, Review) with rotated transform
Project avatar circles with gradient backgrounds
Gradient progress bars (accent to accent2 blend)
Create-new card with dashed border and plus-circle icon
Search input with magnifying glass icon pill

views.metaphor: Workshop Tent — big top project details
uniqueElements: Sticky sidebar with icon-labeled navigation items
Meta card with key-value rows and status badge
Tech stack chip pills in surface color
Goals checklist with check-circle/circle toggle icons
Collaborator avatar row with add-new dashed button

views.metaphor: Kanban Carousel — spinning cards through columns
uniqueElements: Four columns with pastel-tinted headers (pink backlog, green progress, blue review, yellow done)
Column count badges in colored circles
Drag-cursor kanban cards with priority pill badges
Card tag pills and assignee avatar circles
Done cards with reduced opacity and check-circle icons
Pill-shaped toolbar with icon tool buttons and dividers
Dot-grid canvas background (radial-gradient pattern)
Draggable containers with color-coded headers (accent, accent2, purple)
SVG dashed connection lines between containers
Active tool state with accent-colored background
Positioned entity nodes with color-coded headers (accent, accent2, purple, amber)
PK/FK field badges with accent/accent2 backgrounds
Monospace field listings with type annotations right-aligned
SVG quadratic curve connection paths with dashed stroke
Dot-grid schema canvas background

views.metaphor: Directory Ferris Wheel — view from the top
uniqueElements: Collapsible tree with caret-down/caret-right toggles
Folder-open/folder icon state changes on toggle
Left-border connected tree hierarchy lines
File size annotations right-aligned in monospace
Generate Template action button in header

views.metaphor: Idea Balloon Pop — carnival game booth
uniqueElements: Capture form card with sparkle icon header
Priority pill toggle group (Low=accent2, Medium=accent, High=red)
Balloon-style idea cards with hover lift and tilt
Heart vote counter with click-to-increment interaction
Tag pills and priority badges on each card

views.metaphor: Fortune Teller's Tent — AI oracle consultation
uniqueElements: AI messages with robot icon avatar on mint/teal background
User messages with initials avatar on accent pink background
Tool action blocks with wrench icon headers
Monospace code blocks for tool parameters
Success result bars with check-circle and green background
Grouped sections with icon headers on surface background
Carnival lever toggle switches with mechanical bounce animation
Toggle option button groups for theme selection
Integration rows with brand icons and connect/connected buttons
Danger zone section with dashed red border top

globalElements.navigation: Fixed floating pill nav bar centered at top, bottom-drawer on mobile
globalElements.ambientEffect: 3 CSS-animated floating confetti particles with slow vertical drift
globalElements.tooltips: Dark rounded speech bubbles with bottom-pointing arrow
globalElements.loading: Spinning segmented prize wheel with 6 colored segments and pointer
globalElements.microFeedback: Star emoji pop with scale+rotate keyframe at click position
globalElements.scrollReveal: Staggered translateY bounce-in with opacity fade
globalElements.rideBadges: Numbered ride badges (#1-#10) using accent2 color pill

librariesUsed.name: GSAP
librariesUsed.purpose: Card hover lift/tilt, button puff-up scale, progress bar fill, squash-and-stretch click, input focus bounce

librariesUsed.name: GSAP ScrollTrigger
librariesUsed.purpose: Registered for potential scroll-driven animation (currently using JS-based reveal)

librariesUsed.name: Phosphor Icons
librariesUsed.purpose: Icon system for navigation pills, content sections, tool actions, and tree structure

antiRepeatCompliance: Uses floating top pill toggle nav (NOT bottom bar from P1, swooping top bar from P2, right-rail from P3/P6, floating dock from P4, minimal top bar from P5)

Uses cotton-candy pink #ff6b9d + mint #4ecdc4 on warm cream #fff5f0 (NOT pink+mint neon on white P1, turquoise+coral on teal P2, purple+yellow on dark P3, cherry+blue on cream P4, teal+magenta on dark P5, avocado+gold on cream P6)
Uses Fredoka One + Quicksand + Space Mono (NOT Fredoka+Nunito P1/P2, Righteous+Poppins P3, Cherry Bomb+Lato P4, Permanent Marker+Cabin P5, Pacifico+Atkinson P6)
Uses fairground carousel metaphor (NOT diner P1, googie space-age P2, cinema P3, soda fountain P4, roadside motel P5, kitchen appliances P6)
Uses horizontal card-flip-slide page transition (NOT bounce slide P1, view-swoop P2, film-reel P3, receipt-roll P4, headlight-sweep P5, recipe-box-flip P6)
Uses fortune teller tent chat with rounded bubbles (NOT comic speech P1/P3, space radio P2, napkin notes P4, CB radio P5, recipe exchange P6)
Uses spinning prize wheel loading (NOT jukebox P1, orbital ring P2, film countdown P3, straw bubbles P4, vacancy sign P5, oven timer P6)
Does NOT use any anti-repeat items: no diner booth, no jukebox bar, no chrome trim, no googie swoosh, no drive-in screen, no rocket dashboard, no tiki lounge
